Patterns we noticed
Possible patterns from the last 90 days. Not medical advice.
MEDIUM PRIORITY
Consider light daily activity
A 30-minute walk on low-step days may reduce migraine risk. Aim for 3,000 steps minimum.
DETECTED PATTERNS
Low activity23 Apr
1,538 steps the day before · threshold 3,000
Low activity26 Apr
934 steps the day before · threshold 3,000
Sleep < 6h27 Apr
Two short nights in a row

heda
BRAND GUIDELINES · v1
How to use the Heda mark.
Heda is a quiet brand. Treat it gently — generous space around the mark, restrained colour, and only small bursts of accent.
01Clear space
≥ 1× mark height
02Minimum size
24px UI
36px favicon
64px print
Voice
WE SAY
  • Track quietly.
  • One event today.
  • A pattern from the last 90 days.
  • Yours alone.
WE DON'T
  • Take control of your migraines!
  • Your AI-powered headache coach
  • Unlock pain-free days
  • Exclamation marks
Don'ts
×
No gradients on the mark
×
No rotation
×
No outline-only
×
No stretching
HEDA · BRAND PACKBrand guidelines15 / 15
